SAIA 2163 · Natural Language Processing

Reading the emotion
behind every message

A machine-learning system that detects six human emotions in social-media text — trained on 18,000 real messages and served through a live interactive app.

Training msgs
How it works — the NLP pipeline
01
Preprocess

Lowercase, strip noise, tokenize, remove stopwords (keep negations), lemmatize.

02
Extract features

TF-IDF (unigram+bigram) vs averaged Word2Vec embeddings.

03
Train & compare

Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Linear SVM — balanced classes.

04
Deploy

Best model (LogReg + TF-IDF) served in a live Streamlit app.

Model comparison
Where the model confuses emotions
What each emotion sounds like
Built with Python · scikit-learn · gensim · Streamlit  |  TF-IDF + Logistic Regression  |  90% test accuracy
